case_title: MUNZER DAJANI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S MOTION TO JAN-15-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAJANI, MUNZER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE SF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR WEBSITE STATES AT LEAST TWICE THAT PARTIAL PAYMENTS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED.
